text1:
Hair loss is not just a cosmetic problem, rather it leaves individuals less confident, thus impacting everyday private and professional life.

Since genetic hair loss does not have any other solution, therefore individuals move towards hair transplant. Patients considering hair transplants face overwhelming choices regarding procedures – DHI is one of these options.

DHI (Direct Hair Implantation) in Turkey is the ultimate solution for hair loss. This minimally invasive technique offers natural-looking results, transforming your appearance and confidence.

At <color>Aslı Tarcan</color>, you can experience expert care, state-of-the-art facilities, and competitive pricing. Our highly professional team is capable of performing the DHI hair transplant which helps you regain your confidence and true self.

In this article, we will cover DHI procedure, costs, success rates and everything needed to make an informed decision.
text2: DHI hair transplant developed by DHI Global Medical Group is an advanced version of the <color>FUE (follicular unit extraction)</color> technique. During FUE, the surgeon manually cuts channels in the scalp before implanting hair follicles. In contrast, the DHI technique uses a specialized pen-shaped (implanter pen) tool to cut and implant hair follicles simultaneously.
title2: Does My Hair Type Suit the DHI Method?
text3:
Yes, the DHI method is suitable for different hair types and characteristics. However, with advancements in the DHI method, the implanter needles tips now range from 0.64mm to 1.0mm enabling them to manage all hair sizes and widths effectively.

During the early stages of the implanter pen, such as the Choi pen, it posed serious challenges to certain hair types. Since individuals have different hair sizes and widths, it was not possible to use a single pen for every follicle.

The DHI transplant method has evolved to address this, making it an ideal solution for patients with different hair types and characteristics.
text4:
DHI implantation procedure works for almost all types of hair loss. However, it is better to have an initial consultation for better understanding of hair loss and adopting the right solution.

Generally, DHI is an effective treatment for people who:

• Do not want to shave
• Are suffering from hair thinning
• Have sufficient donor hair
• Want dense hair grafts
• Have moderate to mild baldness
• Are planning a second hair transplant
• Have a realistic expectation
• Are looking for minimal down time and quick recovery
text5:
Getting into the best physical health will optimize the DHI transplant results. Therefore, it is better to start preparing your body for the procedure weeks before the suggested procedure date.

The following guidelines will support you in preparing for the DHI hair transplant in Turkey:

• Avoid blood-thinning medications
• Stop smoking, tobacco use and alcohol consumption
• Avoid excessive sun exposure
• Avoid intense exercise and physical activity
• Reduce stress through relaxation techniques
• Avoid heavy meals, fatty foods and hydrate adequately
• Avoid using hair products (gel, mousse, etc.)
• Remove contact lenses (if applicable)
text6:
DHI clinics across Turkey almost follow the same procedure while hair transplant. However, the difference lies between the equipment used and expertise of the surgeon.

Further, results are dependent on pre, post and during procedure care. This is only possible at our clinic, Aslı Tarcan, in Turkey as we offer the best hair transplant in Istanbul.

Generally, DHI procedure does not require full head shaving, cases involving over 2000 grafts may require a full shave. This will help maneuvering the Choi pen easier and getting a better angle on the shaved area.

Here are common steps involved in the DHI hair restoration process:

<header>Step 1: Consultation & Preparation</header>
It is important to consult our hair surgeon to establish expectations and possible solution for long-term benefits. Moreover, it will also clear any doubts in your mind regarding the DHI technique.

Once your candidacy is confirmed, our experts will prepare you for the transplant by trimming hair from the donor area. After which, the surgical team will administer anesthesia in the frontal and occipital parts of your scalp.

<header>Step 2: Donor Hair Extraction</header>
A specialized tool known as the tweezer is used for extraction purposes. Depending on the donor site area, which are generally the back and sides of the head, surgeons will extract the desired amount of grafts.

Hair follicles are extracted one at a time with a punch tool from the Hippocratic crown (occipital area), a place genetically programmed never allowing hair to fall out.

<header>Step 3: Recipient Site Creation</header>
In this step of transplant surgery, the surgeon would prepare the recipient site by using a Choi implanter pen. This pen is capable of preparing the site and implanting follicles simultaneously.

<header>Step 4: Implantation</header>
Follicles are implanted into the scalp at angle that will mimic natural growth. Surgeons use a blunt punch to make 0.6mm to 0.9mm incisions having a depth of about 2.5mm to 3.0mm.

Likewise, on average 1-4 hairs per follicle are used for better results, helping you achieve longer hair.

<header>Step 5: Completion</header>
Typically, each 100 to 200 units will take 15 to minutes for implantation. Thus, the entire process consumes around 6 to 8 hours and is painless.

Our surgeon would complete the DHI procedure, and advise you post-op care instructions. You will also get a growth chart to monitor your progress.
text7: The entire story of transplant results is dependent on post-op care. Since, the procedure takes hours, but care lasts forever. Hence, carefully following our cosmetic surgeons’ instructions will support you to get desired results and meet your expectations. Consider adopting the following instructions to boost up chances of getting your lost hair back swiftly and naturally: • Rest with head elevated (30-40 degrees) • Apply ice packs to reduce swelling • Avoid bending, lifting, or strenuous activities • Apply topical creams/ointments (as directed) • Avoid shampooing, dying and styling products • Do not expose head to direct sun exposure • Avoid using hot water • Pat dry with towel (avoid rubbing) • Schedule follow-up appointments with our surgeon
title7: What to Expect: Recovery and Results
text8: DHI has delivered numerous positive results and there are large numbers of satisfied customers. With advancements, this hair transplant method has gained popularity. Here is what to expect post-DHI surgery: • During the first week: You will have to visit the clinic a day after the transplant to get your stitches removed. Our surgeon will also get a chance to check your grafts and clean surgical areas. They will also get photos for monthly comparison. On the third or fourth day, you will get your first wash at the clinic. Our experts will prepare your wash by applying a solution for a 30-minute session. • During the second week: Stay gentle to your transplanted hair, although it is stronger by this time. You do not have to worry even if you see hair fall. Further, you need to continue applying the solution as advised by the doctor. If you plan to wash your head, use no pressure or towel. It is better to use a hair dryer in a cool mode. • A month later: You may experience shock hair loss. However, do not worry, as it is a normal part of the healing process. Once you pass this hair shedding phase, your hair will start to regrow. • From sixth to twelfth month: The result will start to show off during this phase. However, the final results of DHI hair transplant become visible in almost 18 months post-procedure.
text9: DHI is an advanced hair transplant technique that has numerous advantages over alternate methods. Although, robotic hair transplant is the latest technique, yet patients prefer adopting DHI due to its cost and better results. Further, individuals who have experienced DHI hair transplants provide the best reviews. Follows a few key benefits of DHI hair transplant: • Downtime: DHI has the minimum downtime out of all other transplant techniques. As you can get back to routine within 24 hours after the procedure. • Precision: Choi pen offers a treatment full of precision as it provides control over the angle, depth and direction of each follicle. • Non-invasive: The procedure is non-invasive and painless. Generally, you will not be advised even to take painkiller medicines. • Success Rate: DHI has a high graft survival rate, reaching up to 95%, thus almost ensuring hair restoration. • Scarring: It offers almost no scarring. Since, no stitches and sutures are involved, thus making it highly safe. • Natural Hairline: You can get a customized hairline as per your wishes as DHI can deliver a natural looking hairline.
text11:
The room for development in modern times is always available even in the best procedures. Similarly, DHI hair transplant also has its drawbacks.

These disadvantages also come in the form of side effects. So let’s have a look at the cons of direct hair implant:

• Redness or inflammation
• Itching, tingling or dryness
• Numbness or temporary sensory loss
• Pain or discomfort during procedure
• May require touch-ups or revisions
• Visible scarring (rare)
• It allows a maximum of up to 3000 grafts in one session
text12: Does hair grow back after DHI? It largely depends on the overall health of the patient, quality and quantity of follicles. However, if everything goes as planned, DHI produces one of the best hair growth results. What is the most advanced hair transplant method? DHI is the most advanced hair transplant method and it produces the highest success rate. It is also the most precise and offers quickest recovery. How long till I start to see my hair grow after DHI? Every client has a different experience. However, on average you will start seeing your hair grow between 6–12 months of the DHI process. Does DHI damage existing hair? Although DHI is a non-invasive procedure, it can still involve some amount of damage to surrounding hairs due to shock loss. However, it has the best hair transplant procedure when it comes to supporting existing hair. How long does it take for hair grafts to secure? Generally, the first 24 hours post-op is the most critical period for grafts. However, it takes around 10 days for the transplanted hair grafts to be fully secure. How does the DHI Choi pen work? The DHI Choi implanter pen enables precise hair follicle extraction with zero incision. Since, the extracted follicle is simultaneously loaded on the pen, thus allowing direct implantation.
